name: Update Product Details Performance Test — PUT /api/v1/products/{product_id}
description: Validate full replace product updates via PUT /api/v1/products/{product_id} under concurrent update load, ensuring the 90th percentile response time and error rate meet targets, and that updates are consistent (reflected in subsequent GET reads).
corresponding NFR: NFR 2: Update Product Details (Full Replace) — PUT /api/v1/products/{product_id} must achieve ≤ 700 ms for 90% of requests, error rate < 1%, simulate 30 concurrent PUT operations, and updates must reflect in subsequent GETs (data consistency).
preconditions: Product IDs used during testing must already exist.
A test database snapshot with known product IDs should be prepared.
Authentication token (e.g., Authorization: Bearer <token>) must be included in headers.

input data.data_consistency_check: After each PUT, perform a subsequent GET for the same product_id and verify the updated fields match the PUT payload.

metrics.target: Updates must reflect in subsequent GETs

notes: Defaults applied where required to complete load profile: duration_s=300 and think_time_s=[1,2]. Data Consistency is validated by a subsequent GET read after each PUT and comparing fields to the PUT payload.
